Title: TOP
Feature: SELECT TOP n [PERCENT] select_list FROM table_name ...
Description: Limits the result set to the first n rows (or n percent of rows) after ordering or other query processing.
Virtuoso accepts numeric or parameterized TOP and combines it with ORDER BY and other SQL clauses.
Examples: SELECT TOP 10 * FROM article ORDER BY pub_date DESC;
SELECT TOP 5 PERCENT id, title FROM article;
